productTitle: MikroTik hAP ac² WiFi 5 Router – Dual-Band Gigabit Home Router
name: MikroTik hAP ac2
title: MikroTik hAP ac2
title_extended: MikroTik hAP ac² WiFi 5 Router – Dual-Band Gigabit Home Router
short_description: Dual-Concurrent 2.4/5GHz AP, 716MHz CPU, 4 Core, 128MB RAM, 5x GLAN ports, 2x2 MIMO 5GHz 802.1a/n/ac + 2.4GHz 802.11b/g/n, USB port for 3G/4G modem, RouterOS L4
description: Dual-Concurrent 2.4/5GHz AP, 716MHz CPU, 4 Core, 128MB RAM, 5x GLAN ports, 2x2 MIMO 5GHz 802.1a/n/ac + 2.4GHz 802.11b/g/n, USB port for 3G/4G modem, RouterOS L4

detailed_description.heading: Seamless WiFi Coverage
detailed_description.text: Experience comprehensive and affordable home networking with the MikroTik hAP ac², a Dual-Concurrent 2.4/5GHz Access Point designed for exceptional performance across various Wi-Fi standards, including 802.11a, 802.11b, 802.11g, 802.11n, and 802.11ac. This device simultaneously covers the 2.4GHz and 5GHz frequencies, ensuring optimal connectivity in diverse environments. Whether you need to support legacy devices or take advantage of the higher data rates offered by the latest standards, the hAP ac² provides a seamless and versatile solution. With its dual-concurrent capability, this Access Point delivers reliable and high-speed Wi-Fi coverage for a wide range of applications.

detailed_description.heading: Powerful Hardware Configuration
detailed_description.text: Equipped with a robust 4-core 716 MHz CPU, the MikroTik hAP ac² is designed for efficient multitasking in diverse networking scenarios. This processing power, coupled with 128 MB of RAM, ensures responsive performance and the ability to handle concurrent networking tasks seamlessly. At the heart of intelligent operations is the IPQ-4018 chipset, featuring 4 cores and a clock speed of 716 MHz. Crafted by Qualcomm Atheros, this chipset is tailored for networking devices, delivering reliable and efficient data processing. Security is prioritized with IPsec hardware encryption support, ensuring a secure communication environment. The device goes a step further with IPsec hardware acceleration, optimizing the efficiency of encryption processes for enhanced data transmission security.

detailed_description.heading: Versatility in Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The inclusion of Gigabit Ethernet ports amplifies the hAP ac's connectivity capabilities. These ports, supporting data transfer rates up to 1 gigabit per second, guarantee high-speed wired connections. In the realm of networking, Gigabit Ethernet proves essential, providing low-latency and high-throughput communication for demanding applications. Additionally, the hAP ac incorporates a USB-A 2.0 port tailored for 3G/4G support. This port facilitates seamless connectivity with external devices, particularly designed to support 3G or 4G modems. This thoughtful addition empowers the device to establish a mobile broadband connection, catering to diverse networking scenarios. The hAP ac² offers versatility in power options. It can be powered conventionally through the power jack or conveniently through passive Power over Ethernet (PoE) from a PoE injector.

detailed_description.heading: Flexible Installation & Frequency
detailed_description.text: The hAP ac² features a universal tower case design that allows flexible positioning, whether horizontally as a desktop unit or vertically as a tower case. The wall-anchored mounting kit ensures secure installation, catering to various deployment scenarios. The hAP ac² comes in two versions to accommodate different frequency regulations. The hAP ac²-US version is factory-locked for specific frequencies, while the international version supports a broader frequency range to comply with various country regulations.
